Home.heroTitle: Find the best AI training platforms before you apply
Home.heroDescription: Compare the best AI training platforms, remote AI jobs, and data annotation websites. Read reviews, payment methods, hourly rates, acceptance guides, and referral links before you apply.
Home.heroImageAlt: AI training team analyzing a connected artificial intelligence brain
Home.featuredPlatformsDescription: Compare trusted AI training and data annotation platforms with practical details before you apply.
Home.whyChooseDescription: We do the research so you can focus on earning.
Home.latestGuidesDescription: Practical application tips, platform comparisons, and AI work guides.

Features.verifiedInformationDescription: Every platform is manually reviewed by our team. We test applications ourselves so you receive accurate, first-hand information.
Features.acceptanceGuidesDescription: Step-by-step guides on how to pass each platform's onboarding assessment, with tips from successful applicants.
Features.honestProsConsDescription: Balanced, honest assessments of every platform, the good and the bad, so you can make truly informed decisions.
Features.referralLinksDescription: Direct links to join platforms, sometimes with signup bonuses. No hidden redirects or undisclosed affiliate arrangements.

Guides.outlierTitle: How to Pass the Outlier AI Assessment in 2025
Guides.outlierExcerpt: A step-by-step guide to clearing Outlier AI's evaluation process, including sample question types and scoring tips from experienced AI trainers.
Guides.beginnersTitle: Best AI Training Platforms for Beginners in 2025
Guides.beginnersExcerpt: Not sure where to start? We compare the easiest platforms to get accepted on, their requirements, and what you can realistically earn each month.
Guides.annotationTitle: Data Annotation vs AI Training: What Is the Difference?
Guides.annotationExcerpt: Many people confuse data annotation with AI training. This guide breaks down the key differences, task types, and earning potential of each path.

Platform.visitOfficial: Visit the official platform website to review current opportunities.
Platform.chooseReferral: Choose the all projects referral link or visit the official platform website.

Marketing.aboutHeroTitle: Find part-time AI work, earn in USD, and prepare for every test.
Marketing.aboutHeroDescription: TrainHub AI is built for people who want flexible online work with international platforms. We help you discover part-time AI training jobs, compare the best options, and understand how to pass the tests that usually decide whether you get accepted.
Marketing.aboutImageAlt: Student learning online with study materials
Marketing.aboutCard1Text: We collect AI training, data annotation, evaluation, and writing platforms so you can compare roles, payment methods, and beginner-friendly opportunities in one place.
Marketing.aboutCard2Text: Before applying, you can learn what every platform usually asks for, what type of tasks you may see, and whether it fits your skills and available time.
Marketing.aboutCard3Text: Our guides focus on the real preparation steps: reading instructions carefully, practicing sample tasks, avoiding rushed answers, and improving the quality of your submissions.
Marketing.aboutHelpTitle: From searching to passing the test
Marketing.aboutStep1: Choose platforms that match your English level, subject knowledge, and schedule.
Marketing.aboutStep2: Read the guide for the platform before starting the qualification test.
Marketing.aboutStep3: Practice the task style first, then take the test slowly and check every answer.
Marketing.aboutStep4: Track your applications and keep improving until you land consistent part-time work.
Marketing.contactHeroDescription: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question, found incorrect information, want to suggest a new AI training platform, or have a partnership opportunity, we're here to help.
Marketing.contactTopicsTitle: What can you contact us about?
Marketing.contactTopic2: Suggest a new AI training platform
Marketing.subject: Subject
Marketing.sendSuccess: Message sent successfully. We will get back to you soon.
Marketing.privacyHeroTitle: How TrainHub AI handles your information
Marketing.privacyHeroDescription: TrainHub AI is designed as a public directory and guide website. We do not collect personal data from visitors just for browsing.
Marketing.faqHeroDescription: Quick answers about using TrainHub AI and understanding acceptance timelines across different AI work platforms.
Marketing.aboutDescription: We help people compare AI training, data annotation, and remote AI work platforms with clear, practical information.
Marketing.contactDescription: Send platform suggestions, corrections, or partnership notes.
